description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes Docker images for PyNE-CI. The workflow should trigger on manual dispatch, push to docker/*, and push to .github/workflows/docker_publish.yml. It should build and push two Docker images to GHCR, cache them locally, and then build and push additional images with extra layers. Finally, it should test the images, and if the tests pass, copy the images from :ci_testing to :latest and :stable tags.
